vocab.meaning: có lợi cho việc làm việc sâu/tập trung cao độ
vocab.example: A secluded library is highly conducive to deep work, as it eliminates the constant pings of social notifications.

vocab.meaning: giảm thiểu sự can thiệp/tác động bên ngoài
vocab.example: Noise-canceling headphones are essential to mitigate external interference when studying in a bustling coffee shop.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn để chiêm nghiệm/suy ngẫm
vocab.example: Having a private study corner acts as a sanctuary for reflection, where one can process complex information without being disturbed.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn về tâm trí
vocab.example: A tidy and well-lit room significantly promotes mental clarity, which is vital during stressful exam seasons.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế/sắp xếp một môi trường (có chọn lọc)
vocab.example: Successful students often curate an environment that reflects their learning style, whether it involves white noise or absolute silence.

vocab.meaning: điều kiện học tập tối ưu
vocab.example: Educational institutions strive to provide optimal learning conditions by balancing modern technology with comfortable ergonomics.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi cảm giác tập trung
vocab.example: The minimalist design of the study hall is intended to evoke a sense of focus and academic seriousness.

vocab.meaning: các tín hiệu từ môi trường (giúp kích hoạt thói quen)
vocab.example: By associating a specific desk with study, you create environmental cues that tell your brain it is time to work.

vocab.meaning: một bầu không khí học thuật khắt khe/nghiêm túc
vocab.example: Studying in a prestigious university library provides an atmosphere of academic rigor that motivates students to push their limits.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt sự mệt mỏi của não bộ
vocab.example: Adequate natural light and good air circulation help to diminish brain fatigue during long hours of research.
